ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (E15, cap $15; closes note b35bae5 — a P6 arm was rejected on sentinel-AUC delta 0.0009 on the ~631-row frame with instrument variance never measured).

OBSERVED DATA (snapshot _base-20260719):
- Sentinel scorer = cc_steer/retrain/sentinel.py checkpoint_auc -> athome.train.gate.sentinel_auc = sklearn roc_auc_score(labels, fire) where fire = 1 - P(NO_STEER). Deterministic given per-row predictions; no scorer seed.
- Frame the sentinel scores = the WATCHER frame: eval/watcher_eval.parquet, ACTUAL n=628 (335 pos / 293 neg). This IS the b35bae5 "~631" frame. EvalFrame.load defaults to view="watcher".
- Second frame = eval/gate_eval.parquet, ACTUAL n=1325 (1032 pos / 293 neg) = the "~1364" frame. NOTE: gate_eval is scored by the GATE stage, NOT by checkpoint_auc/sentinel_auc. Both frames share exactly 293 negatives. MDE reported for both sizes; sentinel's own frame is n=628.
- Stored per-row predictions EXIST: eval/probs/v002-20260718-cdfabf2f3a48.json = per-row P(NO_STEER) for the promoted/scored checkpoint. Reproduced AUC(label, 1-p) = 0.9316896744944222 EXACTLY = meta.auc = the b35bae5 rejected/compared value 0.9317. All 335 watcher positives join feedback_events dedup_key 1:1 (categories: direction 240, wrong_approach 62, incorrect_change 18, premature 8, unwanted_action 5, style_violation 2).

PLAN:
(b) Row-sampling noise: nonparametric bootstrap B=2000, resample rows w/ replacement at n=628 (real watcher fire/label pairs) and n=1325 (resample-up from the watcher pool + analytic Hanley-McNeil/DeLong cross-check using each frame's actual class counts). Save full bootstrap AUC distributions (npy+csv). Scorer deterministic -> no seed variance to add.
(c) Judge/label noise: sample ~72 events stratified by category (from judge-v6 corpus), re-vote x5 replicates at opus (tier=large) through the repo's OWN triage stage (cc_steer.triage.triage). E8: one FRESH feedback.db clone per replicate; in each clone quarantine all non-sample events and DELETE the sample's (role=judge,prompt_version=6) triage rows so store.unjudged returns EXACTLY the sample and the judge re-votes. Compute per-row flip rate on is_steering, majority instability, Fleiss kappa (binary is_steering + category). Measure prompt token size first; size N to stay < $15 with margin.
(d) Variance decomposition (arXiv:2512.21326 framing): Var(AUC)=Var_row + Var_label. Var_label via Monte Carlo: flip each eval positive by its category flip prob, recompute AUC. Combine -> total marginal SE. MDE (two-sided alpha=0.05, power 0.8) = (z_.975+z_.80)*SE_delta, reported for (i) unpaired frames SE_delta=sqrt(2)*SE and (ii) paired same-frame (row-sampling shared -> label+pred noise drive delta). Both frame sizes.
(e) Reclassify b35bae5 (Δ0.0009) + sweep-arm deltas (arms 0.9301/0.9262/0.9371/0.9229 vs 0.9317) + other ledger small-delta verdicts vs the MDE: sound vs under-powered.

SUCCESS CRITERION: an instrument-card DRAFT (json+md) to ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E15/out/ giving MDE by frame size, decomposed variance components, judge flip rate + kappa, frames used (actual counts), and each past small-delta verdict re-labeled sound/under-powered. ALL raw artifacts (per-replicate votes, bootstrap npy/csv) retained for independent re-derivation. Predicted direction: MDE >> 0.0009 -> b35bae5 rejection under-powered.
